title: 菊花賞の後に・着陸予定、イマダナシ

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm picking up something on my radar! The target
is in my sights! Interception in three, two, one...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Did you see me, Trainer? Did you watch me
run? ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! ☆ Right?! You see? I'm the one to
watch! ♪

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text: Miss Top Gun! Mayano Top Gun!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text: I'm Otonashi from the Twinkle Monthly. Can I ask how you're feeling about the race?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! You want to interview me?! No problem! ☆
Ask me anything!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Now then...

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
After many trials and tribulations, you chose to
run the Kikuka Sho. Your running style exhibits
your aptitude for long distances...

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text: Oh, pardon me. Erm, how should I put this?

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Among your endeavors this year, it seems like the
Kikuka Sho was your main focu—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Um, you don't have to rephrase it. I understand
what you're saying.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: It's just that I'm not sure why either.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to race in the Kikuka Sho, so I raced in
it. Plus, Brian ran it before.

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text: Brian? Are you referring to Narita Brian?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yep! Watching me race was way more exciting
than watching Brian, right? Right?

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text: Oh... wow.

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text: So you raced to compete against Brian! Amazing!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Then let me be straightforward and ask—are you
also going to race in this year's Arima Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen? Me?

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Triple Crown champion Narita Brian has
announced that she's racing in the Arima this
year.

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
You wouldn't want to pass up the opportunity to
face off against her directly, would you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen—the final race of the year. An
arena in which both a racer's popularity with fans
and their individual abilities shine through.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Aside from Triple Crown champion Narita Brian,
other noted racers—such as "Queen of the
Amazons" Hishi Amazon—have indicated that
they also intend to take part.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Well then... I guess I'll be there too!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I wonder who will shine the brightest—the
superstar, or the rising star? I'm looking forward
to this year's Arima!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Heehee. ♪ Guess the Arima Kinen is next! Let's
do our best, Trainer. ☆
choice_data_list: Are you really sure about the Arima Kinen?
Are you really sure about the Arima Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I'll be able to directly race against Brian
there, right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Heehee, I've been waiting for this opportunity for
so long! This is my chance to show you...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That I can make your heart pound way faster than
Brian can! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having heard her say it aloud, the goal she set at
the beginning of the year feels one step closer
now!
